hook.name: LendingHookV4
hook.description: ERC4626-style ETH/TOKEN LP vault with embedded lending: LPs deposit to earn swap fees, borrowers post TOKEN collateral for ETH loans at 40% LTV, and liquidators close underwater positions. The hook skims a 0.5% protocol fee on every swap via BeforeSwapDelta/AfterSwapDelta, and blocks swaps in any block that contained a liquidation.
